caption: The video features an animated character that appears to be a stylized, robotic figure with blue horns and a red cap, dressed in a suit with a "Trade Santa" badge. The character is multitasking, holding a phone to one ear with a speech bubble saying "BUY," while the other hand holds a device with a speech bubble saying "SELL." The character also has two additional arms, each holding a piece of paper, and is positioned in front of a laptop displaying a pink Pac-Man-like logo. The background is a solid yellow color, and the top right corner features the "Cointelegraph" logo. The scene suggests a busy, high-energy environment related to trading or financial activities.
